validatingBody: One moment while we verify your invite link.
missingTokenBody: The link you followed is missing a token. Ask whoever invited you to send a new one.
invalidBody: It may have been changed or revoked. Ask whoever invited you to send a fresh link.
expiredBody: Invitations are valid for a limited time. Ask whoever invited you to send a new link.
alreadyAcceptedTitle: This invitation has already been accepted
alreadyAcceptedBody: Sign in with your existing account to continue.
readyBodyForEmail: Sign in or create a new account with <bold>{{email}}</bold> to accept the invitation.
readyBodyGeneric: Sign in or create a new account to accept the invitation.
acceptingBody: One moment while we set up your access.
acceptedBody: Your invitation was accepted. Taking you to your dashboard.
acceptErrorBody: Something went wrong while accepting. Try again or contact the person who invited you.
